label: Pawn capacity factor
description: Multiplies a stat based on how efficiently the pawn performs a body capacity.

capacity.label: Capacity
capacity.description: PawnCapacityDef whose efficiency value is used to compute the factor.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative weight of this factor when blending multiple capacity factors. Default is 1.

max.label: Max
max.description: Upper bound on the capacity efficiency before it is used as a factor. Default is 9999 (effectively uncapped).

useReciprocal.label: Use reciprocal
useReciprocal.description: If true, the factor is inverted (1 / efficiency) so higher capacity reduces the stat. Capped at 5.

allowedDefect.label: Allowed defect
allowedDefect.description: Capacity efficiency may fall this far below 1 without penalising the stat. Smooths out minor impairments.
